command: STT_AUTH=fresh STT_MODES=private STT_FIXTURES=h1_6 STT_INJECT_MIC_AUDIO=true STT_PRIVATE_MODEL=whisper-base.en STT_CORPUS_OUT=/private/tmp/stt-p6-human-bd94-base-h1_6.json HEADLESS=true BASE_URL=http://localhost:5174 node scripts/manual-stt-corpus-proof.mjs

truth: They, like, told wild tales to frighten him.
detailTranscript: They, like, told wild tales to frighten him.
